Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Continued To Dec-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Petitioner Daniel R. Scoggin present in pro per with Sandra Scoggin.
The Court stated to Mr. Scoggin of the difficulty of technical issues in regard to the filing of the Probate's document and strongly suggested to Mr. Scoggin to get a legal counsel, the Court will ruled and treated this petition as a not Amended Petition filed 11-19-09
Matter is put over to Dec. 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. for proper representation by a legal counsel.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
